body: You must register if your total taxable turnover for the last 12 months goes over £90,000. You must also register if you expect your total taxable turnover to go over £90,000 in the next 30 days. You can also register voluntarily if your turnover is less than £90,000. You must pay HMRC any VAT you owe from the date they register you. If your taxable turnover falls below £88,000 you can ask HMRC to cancel your registration.
heading: Register for VAT
